## Operations

### `knowledge_base`

- **`create`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `content` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create] Text to remember (required for create). |
  | `tags` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create] Optional tags for categorization. |
  | `user_scoped` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [create/search/list] true = user-level entry; false = org-wide entry visible to all users. |
  | `kind` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create] 'note' = explicit user request to remember; 'memory' = persistent personal preference/style captured automatically (forces user_scoped=true and applies a sensitive-content filter). |
  | `previous_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create] UUID of a prior entry that this one supersedes. When supplied, the previous entry is marked inactive and the new entry inherits its version+1. |
  | `expires_at` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create] Optional ISO-8601 expiration date (UTC). |

- **`search`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_scoped` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [create/search/list] true = user-level entry; false = org-wide entry visible to all users. |
  | `query` | `string` | ‚Äî | [search] Text to search for. |

- **`list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_scoped` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [create/search/list] true = user-level entry; false = org-wide entry visible to all users. |
  | `limit` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [list] Maximum number of entries to return (max 100). |
  | `offset` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [list] Pagination offset. |

- **`delete`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `entry_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [delete] UUID of the entry to soft-delete. |
